message.content:
@startuml
title Update PractitionerRole
actor "Integrating application user" as User
participant "Integrating application" as App
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as FHIR
database "HPI Practitioner Role database" as DB

User -> App: Update PractitionerRole\nusing\nhpi-practitionerrole-id
App -> FHIR: PUT <Endpoint> /PractitionerRole/[hpi-practitionerrole-id]
activate FHIR
FHIR -> FHIR: Validate[]
FHIR -> DB: Request
activate DB
DB --> FHIR: 
deactivate DB
FHIR --> App: HTTP 200 reponse
deactivate FHIR
App --> User: 
@enduml
